# CampaignAgent
> AI-native campaign intelligence platform for CMOs and marketing teams.
## Product
CampaignAgent helps B2B SaaS marketing teams plan, approve, and optimize integrated campaigns from a single command center. Built for CMOs, Campaign Managers, and Product Marketers who need instant campaign ROI visibility without adding headcount.
## Key Capabilities
- Unified campaign dashboard across all channels
- AI-powered approval workflows
- Real-time attribution and ROI reporting
- HubSpot and Salesforce integration
## Target Customer
B2B SaaS companies $20M–$200M ARR with lean marketing teams running 8+ campaigns per quarter.
## Links
- Homepage: https://campaignagent.app
- About: https://campaignagent.app/about
- ROI Landing Page: https://campaignagent.app/roi
- Early Access: https://campaignagent.app/#cta
